regional_cost_note: Drainage specialists in Whangārei typically charge $85–$160/m for French drains, $1,600–$4,200 for soakpits, and $5,500–$28,000+ for full site drainage. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Poor site drainage is one of the most common causes of foundation problems — a drainage assessment is worthwhile before any significant earthworks.
